title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce costs, and extend Claude's capabilities with web scraping, media generation, and token usage tracking. The plugins include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic-native skills, and others for model swapping and security guidance.
